playbook.intent: From a one-line tweeted hypothesis to a Gumroad/Stripe-collected first paying customer, with all build/marketing/ship steps audience-driven and lean.
playbook.scope: From a one-line tweeted hypothesis to a Gumroad/Stripe-collected first paying customer, with all build/marketing/ship steps audience-driven and lean.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Tweet the hypothesis
stage.intent: Float the one-line problem statement publicly.

tasks.task: Write a single-tweet problem statement
Post and tag the audience explicitly
Track replies + DMs for signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with >=10 engagement signals from the target audience.

stage.name: Quick Mom-test calls

tasks.task: DM 5 strong-signal repliers
Run Mom-test problem interviews
Capture severity + willingness-to-pay

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with >=3/5 painful + payment signals.

stage.name: Ugly first version

tasks.task: Cut the scope to the smallest demo-able workflow
Build with the simplest stack you know
Deploy to a real URL within days

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when one user can complete the workflow.

stage.name: Pre-sell + Gumroad/Stripe

tasks.task: Wire Gumroad or Stripe checkout
Publish a landing with one button
Send the link to all warm leads

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when checkout is testable and live.

stage.name: Build-in-public ship day
stage.intent: Use the audience to amplify the launch.

tasks.task: Ship a thread with the journey + link
Reply to every engagement quickly
Cross-post a short version to IH

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when ship day is actually shipped.

stage.name: First paying user
stage.intent: Close the loop with one real receipt.

tasks.task: DM warm leads with a personal close
Take the payment and onboard live
Capture verbatim feedback

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least one paid invoice lands.

stage.name: Kill criteria check
stage.intent: Apply the indie kill criteria before sinking more time.

tasks.task: Score the launch against the kill criteria
Write the continue / pivot / kill call
Schedule the next sprint OR sunset

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only with a written committed call.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content tweet-to-launch-sprint-idea-to-paying-user-in-3-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content tweet-to-launch-sprint-idea-to-paying-user-in-3-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content tweet-to-launch-sprint-idea-to-paying-user-in-3-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
